---
pagetitle: "Publications — Sauleh Siddiqui"
description: "Peer-reviewed publications, working papers, and reports."
page-layout: full
toc: false
listing:
  contents: data/publications.yml
  type: default
  sort: "date desc"
  fields: [date, title, venue, citations, description, categories]
  field-display-names:
    date: "Year"
    description: "Links"
  date-format: "YYYY"
  categories: numbered
  sort-ui: [date, title, citations]
  filter-ui: true
  page-size: 25
---

:::: {.pubs-head}
# Publications {.name}

[Peer-reviewed papers, working papers, and reports. Auto-synced weekly from Google Scholar.]{.tagline}

```{=html}
<div class="actions">
  <a class="btn-cta btn-cta--solid" href="https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=D7Ms9fIAAAAJ" target="_blank" rel="noopener"><i class="ai ai-google-scholar"></i>&nbsp; Google Scholar</a>
  <a class="btn-cta btn-cta--ghost" href="https://orcid.org/0000-0002-2466-8924" target="_blank" rel="noopener"><i class="ai ai-orcid"></i>&nbsp; ORCID</a>
</div>
```
::::
